commands.review_summary:
The PR clears a resumed Codex app-server context-engine thread binding after a terminal context-window overflow and adds regression coverage for that async failure path.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +76. Total +97 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main handles synchronous turn/start context-window overflow on resumed context-engine threads, while terminal turn/completed failures flow through finalPromptError without clearing the stale binding.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for automation to make on the branch.

target.title: fix(codex): clear resumed context thread after terminal overflow
target.body:
## Summary
- Clear a resumed Codex app-server context-engine thread binding when a turn is accepted but later terminally fails with a context-window overflow.
- Reuse the existing context-overflow matcher so the next outer recovery attempt starts a fresh native Codex thread from compacted context instead of resuming the oversized native thread again.
- Add regression coverage for the async terminal-overflow path; the app-server does not call plugin compaction itself.

## Incident evidence
- Runtime log `/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-05-28.log` at `2026-05-28T17:37:04-06:00` shows `mode=per_turn`, `previousThreadId=019e70ea-b6b4-7fe0-8937-fdf34944e188`, `action=resumed`, and projected prompt chars around `222415`.
- The same thread id was resumed again at `17:37:09`, `17:37:14`, and `17:37:20` after auto-compaction reported success.
- Each retry ended with `Codex ran out of room in the model's context window`, then OpenClaw exhausted overflow recovery.
- No `codex app-server context-engine turn overflowed on resume; retrying with fresh thread` log appeared, because the overflow arrived as a terminal turn failure after `turn/start` was accepted rather than as a synchronous `turn/start` exception.

## Test plan
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-codex.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.context-engine.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
